comment: WHO LIVES HERE — grounding/preference input for FamilyProfiles, NOT a safety
source. Hard health constraints (allergies/medical) still arrive on the dispatch's
constraints.hard from the cloud family profile; this file is diets, dislikes, ages,
and who to invite. No dates here, so the day-offset rule doesn't apply.
Names align with the cloud memory profile (Priya, Rohan, Aarav): those are the
residents. The Maya/Leo/Sam set in guests.json are dinner GUESTS, a different list.

members.name: Rohan
members.notes: medical low-sodium — enforced as a hard constraint on the dispatch, listed here for menu grounding
